The '''''Baanu Rass''''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Koros-Strohna|worldship]].

==History==
It was one of the oldest [[Koros-Strohna|worldships]] in the [[Yuuzhan Vong fleet]] to survive the trek from [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|their galaxy]] to [[The galaxy/Legends|the known galaxy]]. It was also one of the largest worldships, at 120 kilometers across.

During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], ''Baanu Rass'' was placed in orbit around [[Myrkr/Legends|Myrkr]], where the Yuuzhan Vong used it as a cloning facility to create the [[voxyn]]. ''Baanu Rass'' was irreparably damaged by the [[Myrkr strike team]], and was abandoned shortly after the [[Mission to Myrkr]].

However, the hulk of the worldship remained in orbit around Myrkr, dead and open to the vacuum of space. In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]] it was visited by [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] and [[Tahiri Veila]]. From the ruined [[grashal]] that had once contained the voxyn facility, the two Jedi [[Flow-walking|flow-walked]] back in time to watch events during the strike-team mission.
